events.label: assistant
events.text: Wrote the assessment to `/app/answer.json`: the wrong breaker listing for the panel is a **fail**, **high risk** — it violates NEC 110.3(B) equipment listing requirements and can compromise trip performance, AFCI/GFCI protection (210.12/210.8), and termination integrity (110.14(C)). Corrective action is to swap in an OEM/classified-listed breaker before cover-up and reinspection.
